description:
This quiz tests intermediate JavaScript developers on their understanding of Promises, including async/await, chaining, and error handling. It uses a friendly, encouraging tone with hints and practical tips for running code in the browser console or repl.it. The goal is to help learners prove and improve their promise skills.
Topics: JavaScript Promises, async/await, Promise chaining, error handling
Audience: JavaScript developers seeking to test or deepen their knowledge of Promises
